voices.name: Bella - Professional, Bright, Warm
voices.description: This voice is warm, bright, and professional, characterized by a Standard American accent and a polished, narrative quality. It features a medium-high pitch with crisp diction and a deliberate, rhythmic pace that makes it highly intelligible and engaging for long-form listening.

voices.name: Shivank S – Deep, Suspense & Horror Narrator
voices.description:
Shivank S – Deep, Suspense & Horror Narrator - A deep and intense Indian male voice that instantly creates an atmosphere of tension and mystery.

Shivank S is the kind of storyteller whose slow, deliberate pacing and low register make every word feel chilling. Whether it’s horror fiction, paranormal tales, or suspenseful mysteries, his voice pulls listeners into the dark with just the right emotional weight.

Perfect for horror podcasts on Spotify, thriller stories on Pocket FM and Kuku FM, mythology content on YouTube India, & Audible.
